one_law: Say it once, sharply, with one real proof — cut filler, repetition, and hollow claims before ship.

beats.label: ALLOW · BLOCK · replay
beats.suggestion: Cut duplicate — say ALLOW/BLOCK/replay once, link to /sourcea/proof for the demo.

beats.label: receipt logged
beats.suggestion: Cut repeat — one line + one artifact link (sourcea-boot or boot-proof.json).

beats.label: policy before action
beats.suggestion: Cut — buyer already read this on the prior page or pricing card.

beats.label: 15-minute screen-share
beats.suggestion: Cut duplicate CTA — keep one Book proof call, delete the rest.

beats.label: proof deck
beats.suggestion: Cut — mention proof deck once in the flywheel, not in every card.

beats.label: $8K deposit
beats.suggestion: Cut stacked win stories — one illustrative $8K example is enough.

beats.label: weekly proof export
beats.suggestion: Cut — retainer section owns weekly export; delete echoes.

beats.label: orchestration slide beat
beats.suggestion: Cut slogan — show the replay instead.

filler_phrases.suggestion: Cut — empty contrast line; replace with one concrete proof link.

filler_phrases.pattern: what prospects remember after the call
filler_phrases.suggestion: Cut filler — state the proof artifact instead.
Cut slogan — keep the retainer price band only.
Cut — say what the demo shows in one line.
Cut hype kicker — use a buyer question as the section header.
